customers_say: Customers find the smart door lock to be of excellent quality, with one noting it has no flaws at all. Moreover, the installation receives positive feedback, with one customer highlighting the excellent job with the GATE app installation. Additionally, the functionality works as expected with all notifications as described, and customers appreciate its ease of use, with one mentioning it's suitable for all age groups. The lock offers multiple access methods and advanced security features, setting a new standard for modern home safety. Customers also praise its appearance and consider it an absolute value for money.

reviews.author: Sagar nimbalkar
reviews.title: My gate services
reviews.body: Third class service by Mygate Very very third class service given If product do not install due to small space of main door and safety door as per technician’s inform. But Amazon asking job sheet but my gate not provided

reviews.author: Nitish
reviews.title: Overall function, high price though
reviews.body: Would say functionality wise no complaints though i really wanted a video one in this price

reviews.author: Ash
reviews.title: Very handy and useful
reviews.body: This has given me ease of life.. since making multiple keys for family members is challenging.. especially children

reviews.author: Dileep Viswanathan
reviews.title: No Installation support in Kerala.
reviews.body: No installation support in Kerala. But the product is good. I had to struggle a lot and got it installed myself.

reviews.title: Good door lock and well installed
reviews.body: Super work .. Skilled professional... Super fast... Very satisfied..
